ddls:
CREATE TABLE "posts" (
  "post_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each post */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the post */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the post */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Author of the post (foreign key to users table) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the post was submitted */,
  "vote_count" INTEGER /* Current vote count for the post */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Category of the post (foreign key to categories table) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the post (e.g., active, deleted, pending) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the post was updated */,
  "view_count" INTEGER /* Number of views the post has received */,
  "comment_count" INTEGER /* Number of comments on the post */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("post_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_posts_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_posts_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile picture */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user profile was last updated */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Brief biography of the user */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the user */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the user's website */,
  "social_media_links" TEXT /* Links to the user's social media profiles */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "votes" (
  "vote_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vote */,
  "post_id" INTEGER /* Post that was voted on (foreign key to posts table) */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* User who cast the vote (foreign key to users table) */,
  "vote_type" TEXT /* Type of vote (upvote or downvote) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the vote was cast */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vote_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_votes_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_votes_post_id FOREIGN KEY ("post_id") REFERENCES posts ("post_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "post_tags" (
  "post_id" INTEGER /* Post that the tag is associated with (foreign key to posts table) */,
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Tag associated with the post (foreign key to tags table) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("post_id", "tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "post_id" INTEGER /* Post that the comment is on (foreign key to posts table) */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* User who posted the comment (foreign key to users table) */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the comment */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the comment was posted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_post_id FOREIGN KEY ("post_id") REFERENCES posts ("post_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_analytics" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* User whose activity is being tracked (foreign key to users table) */,
  "post_views" INTEGER /* Number of post views by the user */,
  "post_comments" INTEGER /* Number of post comments by the user */,
  "post_votes" INTEGER /* Number of post votes by the user */,
  "last_activity" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last activity by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
